value.mctools_description: Investigate the Plugin Trace Log and finding records with easy filtering and display possibilities
value.mctools_latestreleasenote:
Export to Excel functionality added!
  - Either includes all visible columns or everything, also with Trace Details and Exception details.

Filtering on-the-fly
  - Open filtering text box with CTRL+SHIFT+F
  - Now also has the Match Cases option
  - Minor bug fixes

Possible to call PTV from other tools and filter automatically by Message.
Thanks @drivardxrm for your PR!

Using Windows App Notifications (Toasts) to let you know when new traces are added and informing you how to support my tool for the creator, still maintaining and improving this tool after 10 years, new, less intrusive!

Read the latest release notes!
https://jonasr.app/ptv/releases/#1.2026.01.001
